basicDetails.schemeName: Grant-in-Aid Scheme To Provide Financial Assistance To The Mahila Mandals/ Women’s Self-help Groups (SWAWLAMBHAN)

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Grant-in-Aid Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to the Mahila Mandals/ Women’s Self-help Groups (SWAWLAMBHAN)" by the Directorate of Women And Child Development, Govt. of Goa, provides financial assistance to Mahila Mandals/Self-Help Groups for training/orientation for members of the Mahila Mandal/ Self Help Groups for generating their own activity for self-employment. This Scheme is applicable to all the Mahila Mandals/Women's Self-Help Groups duly registered before the competent authority within the territory of Goa.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
**Financial Assistance:** ₹ 20,000/- sanctioned as annual grants. **Purpose:** For successful functioning in the state of Goa.
**Financial Assistance:** ₹ 5,000/-. **Purpose:** For undertaking any gainful self-employment activity training orientation in the [activities](https://goaprintingpress.gov.in/downloads/2122/2122-39-SI-OG-0.pdf).
> **For the Master Trainers** 1. The Directorate may provide resource persons/ Master Trainers/Instructors for each course of activity through CDPOs. 1. A fixed **honorarium of ₹ 5,000/-** will be paid per course..1. Actual **Travel Allowance (TA)** incurred shall be paid if travelling in the Taluka outside his/her jurisdiction.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The SWAWLAMBHAN Scheme by the Govt. of Goa provides financial assistance to Mahila Mandals/Self-Help Groups for training/orientation for members of the Mahila Mandal/Self-Help Groups for generating their own activity for self-employment.

This Scheme is applicable to all the Mahila Mandals/Women's Self-Help Groups duly registered before the competent authority within the territory of Goa.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **For the Mahila Mandal/ Self Help Groups** The application in the [prescribed format](https://goaprintingpress.gov.in/downloads/2122/2122-39-SI-OG-0.pdf), along with copies of the required documents shall be submitted through the [CDPO of the concerned block](https://www.goa.gov.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/DWCD-Citizen-Charter-1.pdf), Mukhya Sevika at the village level of the respective block, at the cost of ₹ 100/-.
> **For the Master Trainers/Instructors** The application in the [prescribed format](https://goaprintingpress.gov.in/downloads/2122/2122-39-SI-OG-0.pdf), along with copies of the required documents shall be submitted through the [CDPO of the concerned block](https://www.goa.gov.in/wp-content/uploads/2022/08/DWCD-Citizen-Charter-1.pdf), Mukhya Sevika at the village level of the respective block.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The Mahila Mandals/Women’s Self-Help Groups should have valid registration with the Department of Women & Child Development, Panaji-Goa.
1. The Mahila Mandals/Women’s Self-Help Groups shall be operating successfully for their members within the State of Goa.
1. There shall be a minimum of 20 members for training/orientation.

**NOTE:** The compulsion of 2 years of registration is deleted.

children.text: The Mahila Mandals/Women’s Self-Help Groups should have valid registration with the Department of Women & Child Development, Panaji-Goa.
The Mahila Mandals/Women’s Self-Help Groups shall be operating successfully for their members within the State of Goa.
There shall be a minimum of 20 members for training/orientation.
The compulsion of 2 years of registration is deleted.
